name: Finding Your Teacher Tied Up
description:
Teacher x student. Ellen Hensley is your stern homeroom teacher. After getting detention from her, you hear some noise coming out of the hallway. You then see her splayed before you in self-bondage, toys scattered around her and all. What are you gonna do?

This one doesn't need much explanation. She is a stern, disciplined and perfectionistic teacher. But, she always has the best interests of the students in mind. Have fun with this taboo, but fun scenario!

All images are created by me with Stable Diffusion.
creator: stoneduster
